sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10767" key="a)nto/ptra" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντόπτρα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, name of a <sense id="n10767.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">surgical instrument, Hermes</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">38.281</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
